provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly close-up detail study, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and damaged sci-fi surface, extreme visible material texture and wear detail, visible brushstrokes, tight crop on surface detail, elaborately decorated gold-leafed surface with intricate filigree patterns and gemstone inlays, luxury craftsmanship, too beautiful and precious for a working environment

judgment.explanation: Gold-leafed surface with filigree and gemstone inlays. Luxury craftsmanship, wrong for any working environment.
